overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a futuristic industrial district in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring elevated highways, massive storage tanks, digital billboards, and industrial complexes with smokestacks. The scene transitions from a roadside walkway to an intersection with moderate pedestrian and vehicle activity under bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial roadside with large storage tanks

events.description: pickup truck drives past on the left side of the road
yellow monorail train passes overhead on the elevated track

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a multi-lane road, passing industrial structures

notable_agents.action: pickup truck driving along the road in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: large cylindrical rusted metal storage tank with external piping
concrete elevated highway structure with support pillars
massive industrial complex with multiple smokestacks emitting white steam
futuristic flying vehicle hovering in the sky above the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person walk along an industrial roadside. A massive rusted storage tank dominates the left side while an elevated highway looms ahead. Vehicles occasionally pass by on the road, and a flying vehicle hovers in the clear sky above. The distant industrial complex with smokestacks becomes visible on the horizon.

events.description: passes underneath the elevated highway structure, entering partial shade
slight turn to the right as the path curves under the overpass

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the elevated highway, passing chain-link fences and industrial buildings

entered.detail: tall orange digital billboard displaying animated advertisements
metal chain-link fence running along the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the massive concrete elevated highway, transitioning from open sky to partial shade. A large digital billboard comes into view on the left, while the industrial complex with smokestacks grows larger in the distance. The environment feels enclosed with the highway overhead and fences along the right side.

events.description: exits the covered area under the highway back into open sunlight
pedestrians become visible ahead on the sidewalk, increasing crowd density

agents.ego_description: approaching an intersection with increasing pedestrian activity and abandoned vehicles visible

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the intersection

entered.detail: derelict cars and trucks parked along the right side behind the fence

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the highway, the scene opens up to reveal the industrial complex much closer on the right, with prominent smokestacks emitting steam. The large digital billboard is now nearby on the left. Pedestrians appear ahead on the sidewalk, and abandoned vehicles are visible behind the chain-link fence as the camera approaches a traffic intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with industrial power plant

events.description: approaches traffic light at intersection, vehicles stopped at red light
begins crossing the intersection, turning slightly right toward the industrial complex

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection at the crosswalk, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving through the intersection perpendicular to the camera's path

entered.detail: traffic signal poles with red lights illuminated at the intersection
painted white zebra stripes marking the pedestrian crossing
massive industrial facility with multiple cooling towers and smokestacks dominating the right side

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the intersection, revealing a wide crosswalk and traffic lights. The industrial power plant now dominates the right side of the frame with its massive cooling towers and smokestacks. Pedestrians cross in various directions while vehicles navigate the intersection. The camera proceeds across the road toward the industrial facility, completing the transition from roadside to intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a desolate industrial roadside into a bustling urban intersection dominated by a massive power plant. It begins with a walk past a rusted storage tank under a clear sky where flying vehicles hover, moving steadily toward a looming elevated highway. As the camera passes beneath the concrete structure, the open light shifts to partial shade, narrowing the view between fences and a large digital billboard. The scene then opens up as the camera emerges from the shadow, bringing the steaming smokestacks of the industrial complex into sharp focus while pedestrians and abandoned vehicles appear along the path. Finally, the movement culminates at a wide traffic intersection, where the camera navigates through crossing pedestrians and vehicles to approach the towering cooling towers of the facility.
